statements.sql: DELETE TOP (100) FROM silver.DeleteTopTarget WHERE LoadedDate < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT TOP (100) ProductKey, ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LoadedDate FROM silver.DeleteTopTarget WHERE LoadedDate < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) ORDER BY ProductKey
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import AS ( SELECT ProductKey, ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LoadedDate FROM silver.DeleteTopTarget ), logical AS ( SELECT ProductKey, ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LoadedDate FROM import WHERE LoadedDate < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) ), final AS ( SELECT TOP (100) ProductKey, ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LoadedDate FROM logical ORDER BY ProductKey ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries read from silver.DeleteTopTarget only. The refactored version uses a CTE structure but sources the same table.

output_columns.summary: Both queries select identical columns in the same order: ProductKey, ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, LoadedDate.

joins.summary: No joins in either query. Both are single-table queries.

filters.summary: WHERE clause is preserved exactly: LoadedDate < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()). Applied in the 'logical' CTE before the final SELECT.

aggregation_grain.summary: TOP (100) and ORDER BY ProductKey are both preserved in the 'final' CTE before the outer SELECT.
